description:
WE BMC is Western's governing biomedical engineering club. Our design team tackles year-long projects and competitions, having recently developed a Smart Toothbrush to improve inclusive healthcare in low-resource regions. See our Projects tab for more!

We also recently competed in the inaugural True North Biomedical Engineering Competition, where Canadian university teams were tasked with creating a medical device to improve ACL recovery tracking. See our Competitions tab for more!

focusAreas.title: Mechanical Engineering
focusAreas.description:
Computer-Aided Designing (CAD)
3D Printing (Bambu Lab, PLA, PETG, ABS, TPU)
Design for Manufacturing (DFM)
